earnings_announcement.description: Press releases reporting quarterly or annual earnings results, financial performance metrics (revenue, profit, EPS), and earnings guidance.

press_release.description: All other press releases that are NOT earnings announcements. Product launches, partnerships, executive appointments, regulatory updates, etc.

analyst_report.description: Reports from financial analysts or research firms.

news_article.description: Third-party news articles about the company.

transcript.description: Earnings call transcripts or other company presentations.

other.description: Any document that doesn't fit the above categories.

time_period_corrections.earnings_announcement_fy_to_q4: If document_type is earnings_announcement and time_period is FY YYYY, change to Q4 YYYY
time_period_corrections.annual_filing_q4_to_fy: If document_type is annual_filing and time_period is Q4 YYYY, change to FY YYYY
